code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
mut line = ""
match line_opt
when Some(s)
  line = s
when None
  line = ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
mut in_word = false
mut any_word = false

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      in_word = false
    else
      if not in_word
        if any_word
          result = "#{result} "
        end
        any_word = true
        in_word = true
        if b >= 97 and b <= 122
          let upper = b - 32
          result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(upper)}"
        else
          result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      else
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    end
  when None
    i = n
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
